inputs.description: Standard use case with CC BY-SA
inputs.prompt: Licence: CC BY-SA 4.0. Intended use: Using a diagram from a Wikipedia article in a printed magazine feature about renewable energy. Modification: Will redraw the diagram in the magazine's house style with updated data.
Licence: CC0. Question: Can I use this image commercially without any attribution?

Licence: CC BY-NC 4.0. Intended use: Using photographs from a European government research institute's website in a commissioned documentary for a public broadcaster (ZDF). The documentary will air on broadcast television and be available on the ZDF Mediathek streaming platform. Modification: Cropping and colour-grading the images.
